constraints.name: operation_type
constraints.description: Each operation allows increasing or decreasing any array element by exactly a fixed positive integer x. Any number of operations can be performed on any element.
constraints.formal: a_i := a_i + x or a_i := a_i - x

constraints.name: range_bound
constraints.description: Array elements are strictly prohibited from becoming negative during or after any sequence of operations.

constraints.name: modular_arithmetic
constraints.description: Since elements can only be modified by multiples of x, the residue of each element modulo x is invariant. An initial value y can only be transformed into a target value v if v ≡ y (mod x) and v ≥ 0.

objective.description: 最大化数组的最小缺失非负整数

invariants.name: monotonicity
invariants.description: The maximum achievable MEX is monotonically non-decreasing across queries. Since each query only adds a new element and existing elements can be shifted by multiples of x without changing their residue class, the set of formable integers only expands, ensuring the smallest unformable integer never decreases.

invariants.name: state_transition
invariants.description: The algorithm maintains a frequency counter for each residue class modulo x. The state transitions deterministically by incrementing the counter corresponding to the new element's residue, then repeatedly consuming counts in cyclic order to advance the answer boundary until a required residue is unavailable.
